meaning: n.定义,解说,精确度,(轮廓影像等的)清晰度
examples: Can you give a more precise definition of the word?
The definition of the digital TV pictures is excellent.
Those driven by temporary fear almost by definition commit themselves to a program of sell, switch, and buy.
Acer says this netbook, with its high-definition screen and Dolby sound software, is particularly suited to watching videos.
